title: Citrusy Fig Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring fresh figs and a crumbly oat topping.
instructions: Cut the fresh figs in half and place them in a baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the granulated sugar, all-purpose flour, and orange zest.
Sprinkle the sugar mixture evenly over the figs.
In another bowl, mix together the oats, brown sugar, and cinnamon.
Add the cold unsalted butter to the oat mixture and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Spread the crumb mixture evenly over the figs.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream, if desired.
